prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `c35c1b4c`.
codex_response:
Implemented `task_c35c1b4c`. The rule is: find the most frequent color and restore horizontal symmetry for that color across the full grid width by filling each mirrored counterpart. The `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint was used because it matched the official examples; `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry.

- The verifier is in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_c35c1b4c/verifier.py#L4) and stays in original RE-ARC DSL style.
- The generator is in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_c35c1b4c/generator.py#L194). It builds a centered symmetric main blob, sometimes carves symmetric holes, adds sparse two-color fragment noise, and corrupts only right-half main-color cells so the verifier reconstructs them.
- Package wiring is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_c35c1b4c/__init__.py#L1). No new primitive was needed.

Validation passed end-to-end: official examples `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`. The generated artifacts are [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/c35c1b4c/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/c35c1b4c/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/c35c1b4c/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/c35c1b4c/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/c35c1b4c/previews/preview_03.png).
